author: jvranek
content:
All 3 PRs have been updated:

I removed all explicit proxy support, the url + opaque auth data is enough, and a proxy could just be whatever occupies url. This made auth_data required, so the keymanager now requires a fully resolved config (the annoying inheritance / config resolution chain died with it). This is justified since the keymanager api should be called programmatically anyways. Since every entry now carries resolved auth, the builder API could stop making authorizations optional, which deleted a bunch of conditional text and edge cases. Also added the missing SSZ encoding on the VC to BN endpoints that James had pointed out.
